seoTitle: Shelley vs Shepherds Flat — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Shelley vs Shepherds Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Shelley and Shepherds Flat.
heading: Shelley vs Shepherds Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shelley, Victoria and Shepherds Flat, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shelley has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Shepherds Flat (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Shelley or Shepherds Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shelley has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Shepherds Flat scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shelley scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Shepherds Flat scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shelley or Shepherds Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shelley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
